commands.summary: Transactional command creation tests passed for registry full, P4 id allocation failure, sidecar install failure, queue full, and close reserved slot behavior.

tests_covered: P4 id allocation failure returns P4CommandCreateFailed and leaves active record count unchanged
Sidecar install failure returns SidecarInstallFailed and leaves active record count unchanged
Queue full returns CommandQueueOverflow and leaves active record count unchanged
Normal command rejects when normal capacity is full
Close command can use the reserved slot
allowed_operations_checked: Reserve registry slot, allocate P4 command id, install sidecar, create token, and enqueue are modeled as a rollback-safe transaction
forbidden_operations_checked: No partial command records after failed transaction
Close command is not rejected solely because normal registry capacity is full
CommandAccepted/token success is not returned before rollback-safe resources exist
